creator: alex@foxybanana.com
text:
I approve this.

On Tue, 5 Sep 2006, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/py-ocempgui,
>
> Please note that PR ports/102889 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102889
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
